cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Why its 5 Stars: Cici biggest weakness is being burst down before she can stack her passive. Angela ultimate (Heartguard) provides a massive shield and, more importantly, a movement speed boost that stacks with Cici passive.

Combat Impact: When Angela is "inside" Cici, Cici becomes nearly impossible to kite or catch. Angela slows also help Cici keep enemies perfectly within her Yo-Yo Blitz range for the full duration.

Strategy: Use this duo to dive the enemy backline. Even under heavy fire, the combination of Angela healing and Cici Spell Vamp makes Cici a "raid boss."

counters.counter_desc:
Why its 5 Stars: Cici Skill 1 damage scales based on the target Max HP. Because X.Borg health is split between his armor and his actual HP, Cici damage is calculated against his very low base HP, making her attacks significantly weaker.

The Mobility Gap: While Cici likes to kite, X.Borg Skill 1 (Fire Stakes) applies a continuous slow that can prevent Cici from staying in her optimal range. Once Cici HP is low, X.Borg True Damage burst from his Ultimate can execute her before she can heal back up.

Strategy against him: If you are forced to play this matchup, focus on clearing the lane and rotating. Do not try to 1v1 him unless his armor is already broken.

dominants.dominant_desc:
To "set the stage" and dominate the battlefield as Cici in 2026, follow these phase-specific strategies:

Laning Stage (Early Game)

Stack Maintenance: Always build your Performer Delight passive stacks on minions before engaging. At full (10) stacks, your movement speed and Spell Vamp are doubled, making you much harder to kill.

Selective Poking: Use Skill 1 to poke from the edge of its range. Because it deals damage based on the target's Max HP, Cici is particularly effective against tanky EXP laners like Terizla or Thamuz.

The Double Bounce: Use Skill 2 not just for mobility, but to damage enemies by landing on them, which allows for a second leap to safely reposition. 

Teamfight Stage (Mid to Late Game)

Double Targeting: Your Ultimate, Curtain Call, is your "stage opener." Use it to link two enemies; this allows your Skill 1 to hit both targets simultaneously, drastically increasing your total damage output and healing in a crowd.

Kiting over Tanking: Unlike traditional fighters, Cici should not be the primary initiator. Wait for the main crowd control (CC) skills to be used, then enter the fight to "clean up" using your superior movement speed to kite around enemies.

Objective Focus: If no heroes are nearby, your Skill 1 can target Turrets or the Base, making Cici a surprisingly fast split-pusher in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
This setup is the most consistent for EXP laning in 2026, focusing on maximizing her ability to heal while kiting enemies. 

Sub-talent 1: Thrill or Rupture. Use Thrill for raw adaptive attack to boost skill damage, or Rupture if you need early-game penetration against bulky opponents.

Sub-talent 2: Festival of Blood. This is essential. It provides a significant boost to her Spell Vamp, which is her primary source of survival during her Skill 1 (Yo-Yo Blitz).

Core Talent: Brave Smite. Cici triggers this easily due to her low-cooldown skills, providing consistent HP regeneration whenever she deals damage.

equips.equip_desc:
The best equipment build for Cici in 2026 focuses on a core of damage, sustain, and defensive items that synergize with her constant skill usage and natural spell vamp.

Tough Boots (or Warrior Boots): These are crucial for early-game durability. Choose Tough Boots against heavy magic damage and crowd control (CC) teams, or Warrior Boots for physical damage matchups.

War Axe: A must-have item. It provides physical attack, a large chunk of HP, cooldown reduction, and true damage stacks that Cici can proc almost instantly with her Skill 1 (Yo-Yo Blitz), significantly boosting her damage output and sustain.

Brute Force Breastplate: This item offers physical defense and HP, but its real value for Cici is the passive. Dealing damage grants stacking movement speed and physical & magic defense, which is perfectly suited to her active, kiting playstyle. 

Hunter Strike: A good mid-game option for more offensive pressure. It provides cooldown reduction and adaptive attack. The passive grants a burst of movement speed after dealing damage, helping her chase or escape more effectively.

Queen's Wings: A powerful defensive item when you need more survivability. It provides HP, attack, and cooldown reduction. Its passive, Demonize, offers massive damage reduction and spell vamp when her HP drops low, helping her survive burst.

hero.hero_overview: Cici is a sustain-based Fighter who functions differently from "burst" fighters like Dyrroth or "tanky" fighters like Terizla. Her power comes from her passive, Performer Delight, which builds stacks as she deals damage. At full stacks, she gains significantly increased Movement Speed and Spell Vamp. In the 2026 meta, she is primarily played in the EXP Lane, though she remains a viable niche Jungler.
hero.hero_strength: Cici primary strength is her unmatched kiting ability; her Skill 1 allows her to stay highly mobile while dealing continuous damage, making her nearly impossible for melee heroes to catch. This is amplified by her anti-tank scaling, as her damage is based on the target's Max HP, allowing her to melt durable frontliners that other fighters struggle to scratch. Additionally, she possesses immense sustain through her passive, which grants a massive boost to Spell Vamp at full stacks, enabling her to heal through significant damage during extended skirmishes.
hero.hero_weakness: Her greatest weakness is her extreme vulnerability to burst damage and hard crowd control, specifically "Suppression" (like Kaja or Franco), which is the only CC that can instantly cancel her Skill 1 and leave her defenseless. She also faces a unique scaling disadvantage against heroes with low base HP or specialized armor mechanics, such as X.Borg, who significantly reduce her damage output. Finally, Cici is stack-dependent, meaning she is remarkably weak at the start of a fight and can be easily picked off if she hasn't had the chance to build up her movement speed and lifesteal on minions or creeps.

data.recommend: To achieve the best results, always pair her with an Angela for a 5-star synergy that negates her squishiness, and be sure to use Vengeance as your primary battle spell to counter the high-damage mark

spell.spell_desc:
Vengeance is widely considered the best overall spell for Cici in both the EXP lane and high-rank play.

Cici must stay within a specific range to use her Skill 1 (Yo-Yo Blitz). This often makes her a target for marksmen and basic-attack-heavy fighters. Vengeance provides significant damage reduction (35%) and reflects damage back to attackers, allowing her to survive long enough for her Spell Vamp to sustain her through teamfights.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is the ultimate duo partner for Cici, thanks to his unmatched crowd control and ability to start team fights with ease. His combo of Implosion and Sacred Hammer can group up enemies and leave them completely vulnerable, giving Cici a perfect opening to dive in and unleash her full combo.

counters.counter_desc: If youre a support main facing Cici, one of the best heroes you can use against her is Mathilda. You can use this to disrupt and dive on to her in the middle of team fights, or catch her off-guard in ganks. Of course, Mathilda cannot eliminate Cici by herself. To raise your kill potential, make sure to activate Guiding Wind before activating your ultimate to bring along an ally with you when you dive.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the laning phase, freeze the lane by positioning yourself at the back of the enemy minion wave, forcing the opposing EXP laner to get an advantage in positioning. Utilize Yo-Yo Blitz whenever the enemy hero approaches. If the enemy also has a strong early game, focus on last-hitting minions without pushing too far to avoid exposing yourself to potential ganks. Upon reaching level four, prioritize maxing Performers Delight and keep an eye on the Turtle spawn on your side. Optimize your combo by initially maxing your passive ability, then engaging with Buoyant Bounce and Yo-Yo Blitz in team fights. If there are two or more enemies, manually direct the ultimate, Curtain Call, toward the enemy carry while dealing damage with Yo-Yo Blitz. Always ensure you have full stacks of Performers Delight before entering fights for maximum effectiveness.

emblems.emblem_desc: As both the teams frontliner and damage dealer, opting for the Fighter Emblem is ideal for Cici. This emblem offers essential stats to enhance her survivability in team fights, including Spell Vamp and Hybrid Defense. Regarding talents, prioritize Inspire for the extra Cooldown Reduction and Festival of Blood for Spell Vamp. The core talent for Cici should be Brave Smite, as it significantly contributes to her durability during the laning phase.

equips.equip_desc: Start by prioritizing War Axe for its cooldown reduction and the added damage synergy with her offensive skills. Pair this with the Brute Force Breastplate which gives you a solid combination of offense, defense, and mobility, enhancing your ability to zone enemies out. As the game progresses into the mid-game, Oracle becomes essential for amplifying the heros shield effects and providing substantial health regeneration. This makes you harder to kill and allows you to sustain longer in team fights. Increase your kill potential by purchasing Hunter Strike next. The item offers an extra burst of damage and mobility, giving her the edge in both chasing down opponents and repositioning during engagements. Blade Armor reflects damage to attackers, effectively countering enemy marksman and high Physical Damage dealers.

hero.hero_overview: Hero Cici comes with a costume dominated by the color orange and long blue hair. She is also seen wielding a yo-yo as her main weapon. This hero has deadly single-target damage and is suitable for team fights.
hero.hero_strength: Cici is an EXP lane hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang who excels in pick-offs and killing enemy carries in the backline using her deadly yo-yo.
hero.hero_weakness: Unlike many fighters who have solid wave-clear capabilities, Cici doesnt have any, which will be a new experience for experienced fighter mains looking to play her.

spell.spell_desc: As the EXP laner of the team, Vengeance is a great choice because it helps you survive longer in fights by reflecting some of the damage you take back to your attackers. This fits well with the heros ability to handle a lot of damage, making her hard to take down.

hero.hero_overview: Cici offers a balanced gameplay experience. Her mobility and sustained damage make her a formidable opponent in one-on-one situations. However, she may face challenges in team fights due to her reliance on single-target damage and the necessity for precise positioning. Overall, Cici is appreciated for her unique mechanics and the dynamic playstyle she brings to the battlefield.
hero.hero_strength: As a Fighter, Cici excels in the EXP lane, utilizing her agility and continuous damage output to outmaneuver opponents. Her abilities allow her to engage enemies effectively, sustain herself during battles, and disrupt enemy formations. Players often adopt a kiting strategy with Cici, dealing damage while maintaining distance from adversaries.
hero.hero_weakness: Heroes with high burst damage, like Eudora, Saber, or Beatrix, can quickly eliminate her before she has time to stack her passive or sustain herself.
